items.title: Mexican Peso rises on soft US jobs data, intervention speculation
items.summary: The Mexican Peso advanced, boosted by a weaker-than-expected US jobs report that weighed on the US Dollar, which was also undermined by a rumored intervention in FX markets by Japanese authorities. At the time of writing
items.title_ko: 멕시코 페소, 소프트 미국 일자리 데이터, 개입 추측에 상승
